release_notes: 修正內網監聽模式下無法啟動與無法從 Manager 安裝插件的問題
changes: 修正舊環境開啟內網監聽後仍綁在 localhost、需反覆重啟才會進入監聽模式的問題
修正內網監聽模式下從 ComfyUI Manager 安裝插件失敗 (security_level / network_mode 設定與路徑修正)

en: Fixed: legacy environments now honor LAN listen setting on first start (previously fell back to localhost until several restarts)
Fixed: installing custom nodes via ComfyUI Manager in LAN listen mode (writes security_level and network_mode=personal_cloud to the correct repo-local config.ini)
zh-TW: 修正舊環境開啟內網監聽後仍綁在 localhost、需反覆重啟才會進入監聽模式的問題
修正內網監聽模式下從 ComfyUI Manager 安裝插件失敗 (security_level / network_mode 設定與路徑修正)
